description_long: This is a modern rectangular table with a rich, dark wooden top and a solid, black pedestal base. The tabletop features a smooth, polished wood grain with a warm reddish-brown hue, giving it a sophisticated and elegant appearance. The base is a single, wide, rectangular support that provides stability and a contemporary aesthetic, contrasting with the natural wood above. The edges of the tabletop are slightly beveled, adding a subtle design detail. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. This table would be suitable for use in urban environments such as meeting rooms, lobbies, or communal spaces.
description: A modern rectangular table with a dark wooden top and a solid black pedestal base, featuring a smooth, polished finish and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the rectangular wooden tabletop and the black pedestal base beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the table and the thickness of the wooden top, with the base partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the wooden tabletop and the black pedestal base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the length and thickness of the tabletop with the base partially visible.
